name: swim-swolf
description: SWOLF (swim golf): a derived stroke-efficiency index = time (s) + stroke count for one length, lower is better. Not a new metric field — `scoring: continuous` (like the HYROX run legs) carries both `distance` and `time` on the same WorkUnit, and the derived SWOLF value + its two inputs live in `outcome`/`outcome.components` (§5.18), the same composite-score mechanism used for a judged gymnastics score.
